mapper.insert: insert into ai_chat_session(scope, owner_id, title, last_message, create_time, update_time) values(#{scope}, #{ownerId}, #{title}, #{lastMessage}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select * from ai_chat_session where id = #{id} and scope = #{scope} and owner_id = #{ownerId}
mapper.delete: delete from ai_chat_session where id = #{id} and scope = #{scope} and owner_id = #{ownerId}
